scripts.build: npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/api run build
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/web run lint && npm -w apps/api run lint
scripts.test: npm -w apps/web run test:run && npm -w apps/api run test
scripts.migrate: npm -w apps/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.seed: npm -w apps/api exec prisma db seed
